theScene: You reappear in the long, dimly-lit corridor made of cracked, smooth, pitch-black stone bricks, and take a glance back at the edge of the caverns before trekking deeper into the aged, dark hallway that seems to stretch on forever, making you feel like you're walking in a loop...
Until you emerge in a chamber that splits into four different passageways: two to your direct left and right, and two ahead of you, parallel to each other.
Before you can decide which way to go, you freeze upon hearing multiple laughs echo into the chamber, and the sound of {i}multiple{/i} people approaching: one from each of the passageways.

From the leftmost passage, a tall, powerful woman strides forward with a toothy grin, every step making her impressive bust jiggle in its barely restraining top. Her eyes are permanently alight with dangerous-looking flames, and her large tail sways behind her as she hails you in a husky voice, devouring you with her gaze all the while.
Welcome, adventurer, I am Ceris, first hellhound guardian of the Labyrinth. And I must say, I'm {i}already{/i} looking forward to pinning you down and ravishing you into a {i}mewling{/i} puddle of-♥

A shorter, leaner, and less monstrous-looking woman sporting strange, unorthodox clothing briskly enters from the next tunnel to the right, her face set in an annoyed frown, her eyes' blue flames flaring up slightly as she addresses Ceris with obvious agitation.
Fuck's sake, sis, contain your goddess-damned libido for fucking {i}once.{/i}
Ceris lets out an amused laugh while the aggressive woman's angry glare moves to you.
You! I'm Beris, the second hellhound guardian of the Shadow Labyrinth. Don't forget it, you bastard.

As if on cue, there's a dainty, feminine sigh from the third passageway as another hellhound strides forward. She's wearing frilly, gothic garb that screams 'witch', her massive metallic claws resting at her sides while her monstrous serpentine tail hisses eerily behind her.
Beris growls at the petite woman, leaning forward aggressively.
Oh, {i}can it{/i}, Ushris, it's the same fucking thing.
Ceris chimes in with a smug grin on her face as she looks to Beris, taking on a teasing tone as she mirrors her earlier jab.
Gee, sis, can you contain your {i}temper{/i} for once?
Beris lets out a noise of unintelligible frustration and looks off the side, grinding her teeth while Ushris sighs and Ceris chuckles.
Ceris lets out an amused laugh while the aggressive woman's angry glare moves to you... and freezes in realization.

Before you can fully get her name out, her eyes briefly dart to Ceris, then return to you as she lunges at you in a panic, abruptly tackling you to the ground. Moving her face close to your ear, she whispers in a hurried growl.
Re-Remember the contract: we {i}don't{/i} know each other- Wh-What the hell are you even doing {i}here?!{/i}
You retort at a similarly low volume while Beris shifts atop you, prompting Ceris to speak up.
Uh... sis, we're not supposed to go at them until they're actually {i}in{/i} the Labyrinth... Remember?
Beris scrabbles off of you in a flustered tizzy, leaving you free to stand back up.
Uh- Ah- Ahaha- Right- Fuck- Sorry- Just... really worked up today for some reason-
Hehe, and you were complaining about {i}my{/i} libido.♪
Sh-Shut the fuck up-! You bitc-

There's a dainty, feminine sigh from the third passageway that cuts Beris off as another hellhound strides forward. She's wearing frilly, gothic garb that screams 'witch', her massive metallic claws resting at her sides while her monstrous serpentine tail hisses eerily behind her.
Now, now, dear sister, there's no need to get {i}all{/i} riled up. You're being so unsightly in front of our guest... Not to mention you slipped up your introduction...
Beris grumbles in agitation and frustration at the petite woman, but keeps her mouth shut.
Ushris steps forward and curtsies, using her large claws to primly lift the edges of her dress.
Welcome.♪ I am the third hellhound guardian of the Umbral Labyrinth, Ushris, the Barghest Witch of the Umbral Coven, and caretaker of this Labyrinth.

Beris exaggeratedly rolls her eyes at her sister's introduction, and as Ushris ends her polite, demure bow, her expression shifts into a ravenously smug grin as she gazes at you, her initial dainty demeanor giving way to her predatory nature.
And I have to say, dear Ceris is right: you look positively {i}delicious.{/i}
I daresay you would make for a {i}wonderful{/i} pet!♪ Kehehe.♪
There's a melodic trill from the fourth tunnel as you hear someone slide closer, the sound bringing Ushris back to a more composed attitude.
Sister, remember we cannot simply lay claim to him before the 'game' begins.
Oh, I know, I'm just {i}so{/i} excited, dear sister. I did not mean to impede on your introduction.♪

Ushris' singsong voice hangs in the air as a voluptuous serpentine woman slithers out of the final hallway, coiling up her body to take as little of the cramped room's space as possible. Her voluptuous body is covered in golden ornaments which jingle with her movements, her eyes are covered by an ornate gilded mask, and her voice rings calmly and imperiously while her shadowy serpent hair ominously hisses and twists in the air.
Behold! I am {i}Iabel{/i}, the fourth and final hellhound guardian of the Umbral Labyrinth! Woe betide you should my gaze ever fall upon you, human.

Despite her eyes being fully obscured by the mask, she gives the clear impression of gazing at you, and you feel a slight chill run through your spine... And at the same time, something {i}very{/i} obvious about her sticks out in your mind compared to the other three...
But before you can voice your confusion, all four call out in unison.
And together, we are the {i}'Cerberus Sisters!'{/i} The terrors of the Labyrinth and the end for all who dare trespass it!
The pressure and predatory intent behind their declaration leaves you frozen for a few seconds while the hellhound quartet leers at you confidently.

Ceris and Beris awkwardly look to the side while Ushris frowns at you with a hiss of her snake tail and Iabel sneers in appalled offense, all of her shadowy snakes turning to glare at you as she regally places herself front and center of the chamber.
How {i}dare{/i} you! Of course I'm a hellhound!

Two of the shadowy snakes making up her hair deftly slither into place behind her head, mimicking two dog-like ears, while the rest seem to calm down and avert their attention away from you. Iabel proudly smiles at you while taking up a dignified pose, turning this way and that to flaunt her new look.
Poor, hapless adventurer, you are already shaking in your boots from the terror of my presence, I'm sure.
Before you can share your feelings on the matter, Ushris pipes up, breaking the strange building tension in the air.
Dear sister, do keep in mind we can't prey upon him {i}just{/i} yet.
We will have all the time to toy with him later, so do not mind his misguided words.
Iabel slithers in place for a moment, the two 'ears' sliding back to join the rest of her twisting shadowy snakes, her hands trailing over her curves as she ponders.
I suppose I did let my temper get away from me over someone so foolish and inconsequential.

Ushris smiles and nods placatingly to Iabel as she slithers back to her side of the room, the green hellhound's own serpentine tail swaying excitedly behind her. And with that out of the way, she turns to face you, clasping her massive claws together with an intimidating clang.
Do not fret, dear sister.♪ Now then-
In response to the hellhounds' expectant stares and grand introduction, you appreciatively clap at their efforts of showmanship, filling the awkward silence.
The sisters' reactions are immediate, Ceris, Iabel, and Ushris smiling and puffing out their chests with obvious satisfaction while Beris still just seems... grumpy.

Right? It's downright embarrassing to go through the trouble of introducing ourselves like that only for adventurers to give us blank stares. Or worse, just {i}run off{/i} in a panic. It's rude, y'know?
Meanwhile, Beris' irritation seems to grow with her sisters' gushing, until she snaps at them.
Fuck's sake, it's just a little damn praise. Just 'cause it doesn't happen often, that doesn't mean you should just fucking fall over yourselves! How damn easy can you be!?

This seems to put a damper on Ceris and Iabel's cheerfulness, their happy faces giving way to somewhat chastised expressions, whereas Ushris' gaze knowingly goes to Beris' subtly wagging tail for an instant before she answers airily.
You worry too much, dear sister of mine.♪ I am positively {i}certain{/i} [ThePlayerName] here is just a being a courteous gentleman.
In response, the blue hellhound grumbles moodily as she looks to the side and folds her arms.
I bet he's just fucking playing along hoping we'll cut him some slack, let something slip, or some other tricky shit...
Mmmmh, that is a fair point... But I am sure a seasoned, self-respectable adventurer like him would not {i}dare{/i} stoop to something so uncouth and underhanded...
... and were that the case, he can rest assured that he would find himself {i}very{/i} suitably punished for such sycophantic, self-interested insolence.

At that, all of the hellhounds' eyes are suddenly on you, the four of them chuckling, growling, or humming dangerously in response to Ushris' implied threat, a sudden rush of intimidating heat flowing from them as a result of their combined predatory intent, sending a shiver of fear and arousal down your spine... Until the witch's expression softens and she daintily taps the tips of her oversized claws.
Just a word to the wise...♪ And with that settled-
Ushris is the first to break the silence hanging in the air, her serpentine tail swaying excitedly behind her while she clasps her massive claws together with an intimidating clang.

It is then that something, or more specifically {i}someone{/i}, falls from the room's ceiling in a red blur that ends on the floor with a resounding squish, Beris hopping out of the way in the increasingly cramped room while the other three sisters gawk in surprise.
Mwaaahahahaha! Fool! You have stumbled right into {i}my{/i} trap, [ThePlayerName]!
Proudly stretching her diminutive form to its full height, she spreads her arms wide, gesturing to the four baffled and stunned hellhound sisters.
There's no possible way you'll be able to get past them and their labyrinth of {i}doom!{/i}
She quickly scoots her way down one of the passages with a cheerful, self-congratulatory smile while the four hellhounds watch her go in abject confusion.
But should you reach the end of this trial, {i}hero{/i}, you will have to face {i}me{/i}! Once more, in a pitched, earth-shattering battle, where I will get my well-earned revenge!
Perpetua's 'evil' laugh can be heard echoing from the tunnel for a few long moments, and Beris eventually steps back into her spot in the room, still confused as all hell.
Uh- Well, she was here earlier?-
She was {i}still{/i} here?! I thought she {i}left{/i}! Monsters have free passage! Moreover- How was I unaware of her presence!?
Hm... I feel as though I should give her some pointers on her evil laugh...

Iabel's actually serious statement gets a bark of laughter from Ceris and a glaring harrumph from Beris, but Iabel pays them no heed. Ushris, meanwhile, seems to be chewing on something else entirely.
Turning her attention to you, she takes a dainty step forwards that makes the chains hanging from her outfit jangle ominously.
Hey. You know her. Don't you?
...I... have no idea who that was.

EventText.NameOfScene: ...I... have no idea who that was.
theScene: Ushris' blazing emerald eyes bore into you for a few moments of obvious doubt... Then she shrugs with a metallic clink.
If you say so... Not that it particularly matters.
Ushris lets out a small giggle.
You two have a very strange kind of friendship, then.
How romantic! Like star-crossed lovers doing battle, good and evil in a constant dance!
Ushris awkwardly coughs into one of her large claws while Iabel's hair snakes wiggle in excitement.
Ushris lets out a tired sigh.
Using her huge claws with surprising gentleness, she picks up a clipboard hidden in a recess of the chamber, along with a quill, and passes them to you.
If you wish to challenge this labyrinth in order to proceed onwards to the capital, we are going to need your signature here, here, and here.

She taps on the page with one of her massive claws, and you cautiously sign what appears to be some kind of permission form for adventurers, acknowledging the dangers of trying to get past the hellhounds.
Ushris takes the clipboard back with a smug grin.
Well, everything looks to be in order♪. Dearest Ceris will explain how this all works in detail, while the rest of us will head to our posts and await you.
I certainly look forward to taming you into a cute pet, should you reach me.♪
Ushris strides off down her tunnel with a laugh, her snake tail swaying behind her, its eyeless gaze boring into you while her chains jangle forebodingly with her every step.
Beris lets out an exasperated sigh and heads down her own tunnel with a lazy backward wave.
Beris lets out an agitated sigh and heads down her own tunnel with a lazy backward wave.
There's a long pause as Iabel quietly remains in the room, and Ceris looks to her in mild perplexity, the serpentine woman's snake hair idly slithering about with a mind of its own.
Iabel gives a start of surprise, not expecting to be addressed.
Er- {i}Yes,{/i} of course! I was merely pondering the most elegant way to take my leave.
Now, foolish human, I shall bid you farewell. Pray we don't meet again or else I shall-

Iabel dramatically turns with a wide slither as she speaks, her jewelry jangling along with the sensual sway of her body... then she misses her hallway by a few feet and instead bumps her head into a wall, recoiling with a squeak of surprise while her snakes hiss and flail in shock and agitation, as if berating their owner. Ceris, meanwhile, winces at her sister's 'misstep'.
She then slides down the passageway as fast as she can, carrying herself regally as if nothing happened, and Ceris sighs in slightly weary relief.
Don't worry about Iabel, she's fine... Just gets a little distracted and forgets to check where she's really going.
Anyways! Now that it's just me and you, I'll give you a quick rundown of what you gotta do.

Each floor of the labyrinth has a maze of its own that you need to get through. However, they also all have a locked door that you need to gather the keys to, all the while avoiding the guardians trying to fuck you into the ground and milk you dry.

We have a little tutorial floor if you want some extra explanations and some risk-free practice, but don't let that stop me from letting you jump right in, if you're feeling gung-ho. I'm sure you'll get the hang of it no problem.
Ceris' tail wags behind her with excitement as she growls with mild arousal and her eyes' flames flare a pinkish hue.
And if you {i}don't{/i} get the hang of it, you'll just get to cum your brains out over and over while I ride you into the ground.♥ I promise you'll love it.
She then chuckles as she recalls something and regards you with a sly smile, her tail still wagging.
Oh, and don't get any big ideas about fucking us out of the picture. We'll just get back up, give you a little breather, and be after you again, stronger than before.♥
Hahaha, it's really fun.♥ But yeah, let me know if you have any questions, want a tutorial, or something. Just give me a heads up when you're ready to head in.
She lazily stretches, clasping her large paws together with a noise of satisfaction while her heavy bust bounces from the movement.
Ceris steps forward out of one of the darkened passageways, her fiery eyes lighting up the hall as she draws closer with a lazy stretch, her large tail swaying behind her.
Mnnn, welcome back to the Labyrinth, [ThePlayerName]! Here to try your luck again?
Hehe, or maybe you just want to get fucked into the ground?♥
